typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Fix-session commit traceability points to switcher-only commit 81ac876; no chunk/indexing production diff was provided to address prior m3-fix-true-incremental-chunk-persistence blocking findings.
Prior failing SearchIndexStore.applyChunkDiff/Projection persistence paths remain unresolved in the reviewed fix evidence; the assigned fix commit does not modify those code paths.
Commit 415399b is test-only and does not remediate production-path blockers from the prior failed review for m3-fix-true-incremental-chunk-persistence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require verifiable startup-read evidence (mission.md, AGENTS.md, architecture.md, user-testing.md) before allowing followedProcedure=true in handoff skill feedback.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix reviews reported missing required startup reads in transcript skeletons while procedure adherence was reported as followed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a handoff traceability rule requiring feature commit IDs to match feature scope and reviewed diff surface.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of m3-fix-unchanged-chunk-identity-stability found handoff commitId 81ac876 mapping to switcher files instead of indexing/chunk persistence files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh shared architecture notes so milestone-relevant indexing/projection context is represented alongside switcher architecture notes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer observation noted architecture library content skewed toward switcher topics during m3 indexing scrutiny.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate skill-adherence observation from second fix review.
